titleZh: 公司法对小微中小股东权利保护的考察
titleEn: Protection of Small and Medium Shareholders by Company Law
abstractZh: 聚焦中小股东信息获取与参与权的制度安排，讨论信息披露、表决、分红及救济路径的制度完善路径。
abstractEn: Assesses disclosure, participation, voting and remedy mechanisms in the Chinese context for smaller shareholders and practical gaps in protection.
